english: to climb / to rise / to increase / to get on (a vehicle)
notes: Strong verb (steigen, stieg, ist gestiegen). Used for physical climbing as well as abstract rising (prices, temperature). 'In den Bus steigen' = to get on the bus; 'aus dem Auto steigen' = to get out of the car.

sentences.german: Er ist auf den Berg gestiegen.
Sie steigt in den Bus ein.
